comment: Label taxonomy for /board labels. The type labels (bug/docs/refactor/chore) are exactly what Board-Fill Type detection reads; 'blocked' is what /board work dependency checks read.

labels.name: task
labels.description: Concrete work item with a definition of done

labels.name: blocked
labels.description: Cannot start: waiting on another issue or external dependency

labels.name: plan-task
labels.description: Child task of a tracked plan
